title: Baby Boy Blue Prism Banner (3.6 Meters) 1 Piece - Elegant and Distinctive Decorative Banner for Celebration & Decor
features: CELEBRATE IN STYLE: Welcome your baby boy with our elegant and distinctive baby boy blue prism banner - a perfect decorative piece for making memories and enhancing the celebratory atmosphere.
VERSATILE & EYE-CATCHING: This beautiful blue banner stretches to an impressive 3.6 meters, adding a lovely touch to any nursery, baby shower, or birthday celebration for your baby boy.

DURABLE & HIGH-QUALITY: Made with premium materials, this 1-piece baby boy prism banner is designed to maintain its shape and vibrant color, ensuring long-lasting use and easy storage for future events.
SIMPLE & CONVENIENT SETUP: With its lightweight design, our baby boy blue prism banner is easy to hang up and rearrange, making decorating a breeze for any event you wish to celebrate.
IDEAL GIFT FOR EXPECTING MOMS: Delight soon-to-be parents with this thoughtful and practical gift, or surprise a loved one with a charming touch to their baby boy's room.
description: Product Description Celebrate the arrival of your little one with our Holographic Foil "A Baby Boy!" Banner. 1 Banner - 12 ft. This holographic foil banner features a blue multi-patterned "A Baby Boy!" headline print on a dotted blue holographic background. Hang up as a backdrop or along table edges, this banner is perfect for exciting gender reveal and baby shower parties. Made of durable material that is easy to assemble and hang up. This banner can be reused and easily stored to use in the future. Box Contains 1 x Banner
